abstract: Designed to be Optimized - GhostWriter.AI, Mauro Bennici INT8 Inference of Quantization-Aware trained models using ONNX-TensorRT - NVIDIA, Dheeraj Peri QONNX: A proposal for representing arbitrary-precision quantized NNs in ONNX - AMD, Alessandro Pappalardo How to reconcile AI and privacy - Mithril Security, Daniel Huynh Responsible AI @ ONNX: Metadata, Model Cards, and Provenance - Intel, Rodolfo Gabe Esteves, Bhargavi Karumanchi, Ria Cheruvu ONNX and the JVM - Oracle, Adam Pocock Build your high-performance model inference solution with DJL and ONNX Runtime - AWS , Qing Lan Billions of NLP Inferences on the JVM using ONNX and DJL - Hypefactors, Viet Yen Nguyen What's New in ONNX Runtime - Microsoft, Ryan Hill Accelerating Machine Learning with ONNX Runtime and Hugging Face - Hugging Face, Jeff Boudier PyTorch-ONNX Converter - Microsoft Detect Safety Zone Violation in Manufacturing with SAS Event Stream Processing and ONNX models - SAS, Allen Langlois, Saurabh Mishra, Daniele Cazzari Improving the online shopping experience with ONNX - Bazaarvoice, Matthew Leyburn High-Performance Inference for Video and Audio - Adobe, Nikhil Kalra Deploying on desktop with ONNX - Topaz Labs, Alexander Zhang ONNX Tools: Polygraphy and ONNX-GraphSurgeon - NVIDIA, Pranav Marathe TI Deep Learning (TIDL) Execution Provider in ONNX Runtime - Texas Instruments, Anand Pathak Onnx-mlir: an MLIR-based Compiler for ONNX Models - The Latest Status - IBM, Tung D. Le PFVM - A Neural Network Compiler that uses ONNX as its intermediate representation - Preferred Networks, Zijian Xu Bring the power of ONNX to Spark as it never happened before - Huawei, Xiyuan Wang, Yikun Jiang, Zhipeng Huang
